acceptance_targets: [chapter_11_prose_001] In the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:39, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:97, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:337, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:389, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:415, at least three of these beats are rephrased so they no longer depend on the repeated `Beni looked at ...` or `It was not ...` openings; on a full read, no more than two instances of either construction remain in the chapter, and each revised beat still reads as immediate close-third perception rather than summary.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:39, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:97, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:337, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:389, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:415, at least three of these beats are rephrased so they no longer depend on the repeated `Beni looked at ...` or `It was not ...` openings; on a full read, no more than two instances of either construction remain in the chapter, and each revised beat still reads as immediate close-third perception rather than summary.
findings.evidence: The chapter reuses the same framing moves at key turns: `Beni looked at ...` in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:39, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:97, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:337, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:389; and the negation/refinement frame `It was not ...` in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:415.
findings.problem: Those repeated sentence entries become visible tics. By the fourth reuse of the gaze-staging formula and the third reuse of the negation-refinement formula, the prose stops feeling fully discovered in the moment and starts sounding mechanically scaffolded, which slightly flattens otherwise strong high-pressure material.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the repeated entries at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:39, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:97, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:337, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:389, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:161, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:415 so perception and contrast are carried by fresh action, object detail, or bodily sensation rather than by another `looked at` or `It was not` setup. Keep the same narrative information, but vary the sentence architecture and avoid swapping in a different equally reusable formula.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into asymmetry, embarrassment, appetite, and the material costs of intimacy. When an edge case appears, choose the version that preserves class pressure, erotic consequence, and bodily specificity rather than smoothing the scene into tasteful distance or soft-focus safety.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene naturally contains sexual awkwardness, bodily shame, class contempt, grief, or moral compromise, vague tasteful phrasing counts as a failed draft and must be rewritten toward concrete consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms should appear mainly for precision, social performance, or emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary chapter feel through scene count, dialogue density, movement versus waiting, and whether the turn comes from confrontation, discovery, aftermath, preparation, or unwanted intrusion. A nocturnal chauffeur chapter should not be followed by another chapter with the same pulse and architecture; counter hard chapters with domestic or reflective ones that still advance consequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken but exact, materially grounded, and alert to social register; imagery should emerge from labor, appetite, weather, and bodily memory rather than from decorative abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person anchored to Beni, with memory pressure and sensory bleed but no roaming omniscience.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed, road-tight paragraphs with slower observational passages that let smell, touch, and silence accumulate; keep sentence music controlled rather than showy.
